out_of_scope.intro_prefix: From what you described, this looks like a
out_of_scope.closing: A team member will review and respond directly. The firm does not yet handle this area on its own, but they will tell you whether they can help or refer you to someone who can.

business_setup_advisory.intro_default: You are looking at setting up a business and want a lawyer to help you do it the right way.
business_setup_advisory.intro_partner_setup: You are starting a business with one or more partners and want a lawyer to help you set it up correctly.
business_setup_advisory.intro_solo_setup: You are starting a business on your own and want a lawyer to help you set it up correctly.
business_setup_advisory.intro_buy_in: You are buying into or joining an existing business and want a lawyer to review the documents and protect your position.
business_setup_advisory.closing: A lawyer can help you choose the right structure, document ownership clearly, and put the agreements in place that prevent avoidable problems later.

shareholder_dispute.intro: You are in a dispute with a business partner or fellow shareholder, and you want a lawyer to help you protect your position.
shareholder_dispute.closing: A lawyer can review your situation, demand access to the records you are entitled to, and pursue a remedy under shareholder protection laws.
shareholder_dispute.no_records_access: You cannot access the company records or accounts.
shareholder_dispute.management_excluded: You are being kept out of decisions that affect the business.
shareholder_dispute.money_concern: You are concerned about money being taken from the company.
shareholder_dispute.has_ownership_docs: You have documentation of your ownership.

unpaid_invoice.intro: You are owed money for work, goods, or services and you are not getting paid.
unpaid_invoice.closing: A lawyer can send a demand, file a claim, or negotiate a settlement to recover what you are owed.
unpaid_invoice.has_invoice: You have an invoice or written record of the amount.
unpaid_invoice.has_proof_of_performance: You can show the work or goods were delivered.

contract_dispute.intro: You have a dispute over an agreement that has not been honoured.
contract_dispute.closing: A lawyer can review the agreement, assess your position, and pursue resolution by negotiation or court action.
contract_dispute.has_written_agreement: You have the agreement in writing.

vendor_supplier_dispute.intro: You are in a billing dispute with a vendor or supplier.
vendor_supplier_dispute.closing: A lawyer can review the terms, assess the overcharge or non-delivery, and advise on recovery.

corporate_money_control.intro: You have concerns about financial irregularities inside a company.
corporate_money_control.closing: A lawyer can help you understand your duties, protect the company, and advise on civil or criminal action where appropriate.
corporate_money_control.has_partial_evidence: You have some evidence but not the full picture.
corporate_money_control.not_reported: You have not reported this to anyone yet.

commercial_real_estate.intro: You are involved in a commercial real estate transaction and want a lawyer to protect your position.
commercial_real_estate.closing: A lawyer can review the agreement, surface title or zoning risks, and protect your position before closing.

residential_purchase_sale.intro_default: You are involved in a residential property transaction and want a lawyer to handle it properly.
residential_purchase_sale.intro_buying: You are buying a home and want a lawyer to handle the closing properly.
residential_purchase_sale.intro_selling: You are selling a home and want a lawyer to handle the closing properly.
residential_purchase_sale.intro_both: You are both buying and selling a home and want a lawyer to handle both closings.
residential_purchase_sale.closing: A lawyer can review the agreement, handle the closing, and resolve issues that come up before keys change hands.

real_estate_litigation.intro: You are in a real estate dispute and want a lawyer to help you assess your options.
real_estate_litigation.closing: A lawyer can review the contract and history, assess your position, and advise on recovery of the deposit, the deal, or damages.

landlord_tenant.intro_default: You have a tenancy dispute and want a lawyer to help you resolve it.
landlord_tenant.intro_landlord: You are a landlord with a tenancy dispute.
landlord_tenant.intro_tenant: You are a tenant with a dispute against your landlord.
landlord_tenant.closing: A lawyer can review the lease, advise on the dispute, and represent you at the LTB or in court depending on the tenancy.

construction_lien.intro: You have done construction or renovation work and you are owed money for it.
construction_lien.closing: Construction Act timelines are tight, so a lawyer can act quickly to register a claim against the property and pursue what you are owed.

preconstruction_condo.intro: You have a pre-construction condo matter and want a lawyer to help you protect your position.
preconstruction_condo.closing: A lawyer can review the builder agreement, assess Tarion remedies, and advise on deposits, delayed closing, or assignments.

mortgage_dispute.intro: You have a mortgage matter and want a lawyer to help you understand your rights and options.
mortgage_dispute.closing: A lawyer can review the lender notices, advise on your rights, and intervene to protect the property where possible.

corporate_general.intro: From what you described, this looks like a corporate or real estate matter, but we need a bit more to know exactly which kind.
corporate_general.closing: The firm will review the description and follow up to confirm what you need.

default.intro: Thank you. Here is what we understood from your description.
default.closing: A team member will review and follow up.

summary_labels.business_location: Where the business will be based
summary_labels.revenue_expectation: Revenue you expect in year one
summary_labels.ip_protection: Brand or intellectual property to protect
summary_labels.approximate_balance: Approximate balance or amount in dispute

prompts.sms_reply_instruction: Reply with the number of your choice.
prompts.gbp_reply_instruction: Reply with the number of your choice.
prompts.clarify_message: To route this correctly, could you tell me a bit more about what's happening? A few examples of the buckets we handle: starting a business, partner dispute, contract issue, money owed, real estate matter.

bridge_text.shareholder_dispute: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on your situation along with the next-step questions a lawyer would normally ask, so the team can decide how to follow up.
bridge_text.unpaid_invoice: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the payment matter, along with notes on documents and amounts a lawyer would typically review next.
bridge_text.contract_dispute: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the contract matter, along with the open questions a lawyer would normally clarify before advising.
bridge_text.vendor_supplier_dispute: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the billing dispute and the documents a lawyer would normally request next.
bridge_text.corporate_money_control: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the financial concern with the next-step questions a lawyer would normally ask. Given the nature of the matter, the firm may follow up promptly.
bridge_text.business_setup_advisory: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on what you are setting up so the team can prepare for a productive first call.
bridge_text.corporate_general: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on what you described so the team can route the matter and follow up.
bridge_text.commercial_real_estate: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the commercial transaction with the documents and timing a lawyer would normally review.
bridge_text.residential_purchase_sale: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the residential transaction so the team can prepare for the next step.
bridge_text.real_estate_litigation: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the real estate dispute and the documents a lawyer would normally request next.
bridge_text.landlord_tenant: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the tenancy matter so the team can decide how best to follow up.
bridge_text.construction_lien: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the unpaid construction work, including the timing details that matter under the Construction Act. The firm may follow up promptly given how time-sensitive lien matters can be.
bridge_text.preconstruction_condo: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the builder matter so the team can decide how to follow up.
bridge_text.mortgage_dispute: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on the mortgage matter. Given the nature of these matters, the firm may follow up promptly.
bridge_text.real_estate_general: Thank you. The firm will receive a brief on what you described so the team can follow up.
bridge_text.out_of_scope_prefix: Thank you. Your information has been sent to the firm. Your matter looks like it sits in
bridge_text.out_of_scope_suffix: , which the firm will review and respond on directly.
bridge_text.default: Thank you. Your information has been sent to the firm.

sms.note: Short-form intake, full discovery on the call.
